title: Expandi-craft
description:
This mod expands the 3 main minecraft dimensions, being:
- overworld
- nether
- end

For an expansion of the base game
body:
Expandi-craft mod expands the 3 Minecraft dimensions with exciting additions:

- Introduces a new boss

- Adds 2 hostile entities

- Introduces a new woodset and biome

- Implements Curios API features

- Introduces meat-type food

- Includes scythes and more blocks

- Introduces 3 new ores: ambrezja, opal, and rubies

- Adds 2 new armor sets and Yahiamice

- Includes the rubified sword and pickaxe (shovel, hoe, and axe coming soon)

- Introduces 2 new plants

- Implements darkness potions, tipped arrows, and suspicious stew

- Adds the new graveyard and floating shop structures
